name: Apricot Filled Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 300 degrees.
2. Mix together flour and baking powder in a bowl and set aside.
3. Cream together butter and sugar until smooth.
4. Add egg and vanilla, then beat on medium until well combined.
5. Gradually add the flour mixture and blend on low until the dough is firm.
6. Scoop tablespoon portions of dough onto ungreased baking sheets about 1 inch apart.
7. Using your thumb or a small melon baller, make a depression in the center of each ball, creating a well without going all the way through to the cookie sheet.
8. Fill each well with apricot preserves.
9. Bake for 20-25 minutes until light golden brown.
10. Transfer cookies to a cool flat surface.
